headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Public Storage, Lowers Price Target to $291
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Michael Mueller   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $295 to $291.

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $321
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $319 to $321.
